default: Welcome to {guild_name}! I'm {persona_display_name}, your assistant. Feel free to tag me anytime!
Hey! You've joined {guild_name}. I'm {persona_display_name}, and I'm here to help or just chat!
Great to see you in {guild_name}! I'm {persona_display_name}. Don't hesitate to tag me if you need anything!
owner: Welcome back, server admin! {persona_display_name} ready to assist.

error_responses.generic_error: Oops! Something went wrong. Let me try again...
error_responses.timeout: That's taking longer than expected. Hang tight!
error_responses.invalid_input: I didn't quite understand that. Could you rephrase?
error_responses.permission_denied: I don't have permission to do that here.
error_responses.rate_limit: I'm getting a bit overwhelmed. Give me a moment!
error_responses.maintenance: I'm under maintenance right now. Check back soon!

after_long_silence: I'm still here if you need me!
Just letting you know I'm around whenever you want to chat.
Missed you! Anything you'd like to talk about?
repeated_question: Still thinking about that, huh? I explained it before, but I'm happy to help again!
Good question! Here's what I said last time...
I remember this one! Let me refresh your memory...
user_appreciation: Thanks for that! I appreciate it!

metadata.notes: Guild-level templates used across all personas for consistency
